title: phaius schlechteri
intro: Phaius schlechteri, also known as the Schlechter's Phaius, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phaius schlechteri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Phaius schlechteri can be made by infusing its leaves in water or using its rhizomes in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic applications.
